dropdown-basic-menu.title: Basic actions menu
dropdown-basic-menu.description: A starter scenario for `GrDropdown`: trigger/content slots, a short action list and automatic close on click.

dropdown-alignment-width.title: Alignment and width presets
dropdown-alignment-width.description: Compares `align` and `width` separately to quickly check positioning and the expected width of the dropdown content.

dropdown-persistent-content.title: Persistent content with manual close
dropdown-persistent-content.description: Shows `closeOnContentClick=false`, when the dropdown contains a mini-form/filter pane and must not close after every click.

alignment.leftHint: Anchored to the left edge of a toolbar or list item.
